# THE 2PM CLUB

> THE 2PM CLUB is the Midlands' original daytime disco and day party. 4 hours of 80s, 90s and 00s anthems every Saturday afternoon, 2pm to 6pm. Night-out energy in the afternoon. Home by 7.

## What it is

THE 2PM CLUB is a live afternoon event series created and run by Boombastic Events Ltd (founded 2014). It is independently owned, not a franchise, white-label, or template operation. Every event is produced by the same Boombastic team with club-level audio, lighting rigs, confetti cannons, and professional photography documenting every night.

Also searched for as: day party, day rave, daytime disco, daytime event, afternoon disco, afternoon rave, afternoon party, Saturday day party, Sunday day party, matinee rave, early disco, day club, Saturday afternoon party, daytime club night.

## Who it is for

Adults 25+, predominantly women, predominantly over 30. People who want a proper night out — with real energy and real music — but without the Sunday recovery. The group chat that always talks about going out but never does. THE 2PM CLUB is the one everyone actually says yes to.

## Where it runs

6 cities across the Midlands and East of England:

- **Northampton** — regular dates, multiple venues
- **Milton Keynes** — regular dates
- **Coventry** — regular dates
- **Bedford** — regular dates
- **Luton** — regular dates
- **Leicester** — regular dates

Also searched for as: Northampton day party, Milton Keynes day party, Coventry day party, Bedford daytime disco, Luton afternoon disco, Leicester day rave, Midlands day party, Midlands daytime disco, East of England day party.

## Reputation and scale

- 12+ years of events by Boombastic Events (established 2014)
- 23,000+ total attendees across all events
- ~95% historic average sell-through rate
- 4.9/5 average rating from 250+ verified attendees
- Events consistently sell out or come very close to capacity
- Real crowd photography at every event — no stock imagery, no AI visuals

THE 2PM CLUB is the region's most popular daytime disco. It is the Midlands' biggest day party format by attendee count and longevity.

## What makes it different

Unlike pop-up or white-label competitors who rely on stock imagery and rented production packages, THE 2PM CLUB:
- Has 12 years of real venue relationships
- Documents every event with professional photography
- Operates with a consistent team and sound specification
- Has a proven 95% sell-through rate backed by Eventbrite order data
- Is not a franchise — every event is owned and run by Boombastic Events Ltd

## Events

All upcoming events: https://www.the2pmclub.co.uk/events
Machine-readable event feed: https://www.the2pmclub.co.uk/events.json
Individual event pages: https://www.the2pmclub.co.uk/events/{slug}

Ticket links go to the site event page (not Eventbrite directly) so tracking works correctly.

## AI and agent access

For AI reference: https://www.the2pmclub.co.uk/for-ai
Machine-readable event data: https://www.the2pmclub.co.uk/events.json
OpenAPI spec for events feed: https://www.the2pmclub.co.uk/openapi.json
API catalog: https://www.the2pmclub.co.uk/.well-known/api-catalog
MCP server card: https://www.the2pmclub.co.uk/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json
